name: memcpy_h2n
title: memcpy_h2n
syntax: void memcpy_h2n(byte dest[], struct source); // form 1
void memcpy_h2n(byte dest[], int offset, struct source); // form 2
description: Copies the bytes from the struct into the array, and translates the byte order of the elements from little-endian to big-endian (h2n stands for "host to network").

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Struct whose bytes shall be copied

parameters.name: dest
parameters.description: Array into which the bytes shall be copied

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
